summary:
Claim: Integrated viral DNA in chronic Hepatitis B increases hepatocellular carcinoma risk even without symptoms.  
Evidence: - Viral DNA integration disrupts tumor suppressor genes via insertion mutagenesis. - Chronic expression of HBx protein drives DNA damage and mitochondrial dysfunction.  
Answer: D
